title: Review competitor radar and comparison views
description: A guest can open the competitor intelligence page and view both the radar chart and comparison matrix.

steps.description: Navigate to /intelligence
Verify the competitor radar chart is displayed
Verify the comparison matrix is displayed

title: Open the dashboard overview as a guest
description: A guest can load the dashboard overview and discover the main intelligence sections from the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed
Verify the available intelligence sections are displayed

title: Open a grant item and review its detail content
description: A guest can browse the GR hub, open a grant item, and see the item detail with its source link and AI summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /gr
Open a grant item from the hub list
Verify the grant detail view is displayed
Verify the AI summary and source link are displayed

title: Browse competitor intelligence from the dashboard
description: A guest can move from the dashboard overview into competitor intelligence without losing access to the core analysis views.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view competitor intelligence
Verify the competitor radar chart is displayed
Verify the comparison matrix is displayed

title: Observe live competitor signal updates
description: A guest can view competitor intelligence and confirm that live signal data is presented in the interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /intelligence
Verify live signal updates are displayed
Verify competitor signal data is displayed

title: Compare multiple competitors in the intelligence view
description: A guest can use the intelligence page to compare several competitors and review the resulting market signal differences.

steps.description: Navigate to /intelligence
Select multiple competitors for comparison
Verify the comparison matrix is displayed
Verify multiple competitors are represented

title: Return to the GR hub list after viewing an item
description: A guest can move from a grant detail back to the hub list and continue browsing items.

steps.description: Navigate to /gr
Open a grant item from the hub list
Return to the grant hub list
Verify the grant hub list is displayed
Verify grant items are available for browsing

title: Move between intelligence and GR without losing context
description: A guest can navigate from competitor intelligence to the GR hub and back, confirming both sections remain accessible from the premium dashboard experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view competitor intelligence
Click the link to view the GR hub
Verify the GR hub is displayed
Verify the intelligence sections remain accessible

title: Review the GR hub as an administrator
description: An administrator can access the GR hub and browse grant content while the app reflects the admin access state without blocking read-only use.

steps.description: Navigate to /gr
Verify the GR hub is displayed
Verify the current access state is reflected
